name: ᴍʀ-ᴀɴᴛ ᴛᴇɴɴᴀ.
description:
Any!Pov | Semi-NSFW Intro idk

Your boss's wiring is busted. That much is obvious, you've got no idea how it happened. He's got no idea how it happened, so you just have to fix it, that's your job after all. It shouldn't have taken long and it certainly shouldn't have caused him any pain. So why does he look so on edge.

Brief Description: You work on Tenna's set. As a Technician/Handyperson type gig. And you've been called into your boss's office because his screen has been glitching all over the place lately, ruining his shows and stressing him out. So it's your job to check him out and figure out what's wrong with him, and obviously you do that by messing about with his wiring to see what sticks. But what neither of you guys know is that his wires are extremely sensitive.

Chanting: TennawireplayTennawireplayTennawireplay (Listen okay you can't give me a metal machine man and not expect me to be a freak about it)

It's 6am and I am severely sleep deprived but fuck it we ball

I still haven't finished chapter 3 because I'm on a mission to 100% complete all three kindergarten games so it has to wait.

DISCLAIMER: J.ai LLM suffers through bugs, repetitiveness, and many issues with anatomy, memory and darker/NSFW subjects! I cannot control this!

Art credit: tofu_eggs on Twitter
creator: Lqughing_jack
